_publications._publicationTitle: PRC2-Inactivating Mutations in Cancer Enhance Cytotoxic Response to DNMT1-Targeted Therapy via Enhanced Viral Mimicry.

_contextSnippet: K-means clustering analysis of differentially expressed genes under different conditions in RNA-seq transcriptomes revealed six distinct clusters of genes
details: Successfully identified differentially expressed genes under different treatment conditions, revealing six distinct clusters through K-means clustering analysis
